positive: A complex, highly detailed mandala pattern featuring stylized botanical elements and celestial motifs. The composition must be radially symmetrical and centrally focused, designed as an abstract print for apparel. Incorporate detailed linework, clean geometric shapes, and organic flowing lines, suggesting deep-sea bioluminescence mixed with lunar symmetry. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, and luminous gold against a solid dark background. The artwork should resemble a sophisticated woodcut engraving mixed with contemporary tattoo flash art, optimized for screen printing and commercial fabric transfer. Perfect symmetry, crystal clarity, intricate detailing, vector illustration style.
negative: blur, bad anatomy, poorly rendered hands, text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, grain, noise, artifacts, low detail, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, asymmetrical
